units.title: Meeting People
units.focus: names, greetings, countries, and classroom language

lessons.title: Names And Greetings
lessons.subtitle: first meetings
lessons.narrative: A new classmate says hello. Introduce yourself and reply politely. The target sentence is: Nice to meet you, my name is Lina.
tips: Use the target sentence aloud: Nice to meet you, my name is Lina.
Focus on meet; it carries the lesson pattern.
Answer with a complete short sentence before checking.
